# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: website-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
    cors:
    - origin: ['*']
      method: ['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS']
      responseHeader: ['*']
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 30
    labels:
      environment: production
      purpose: website-assets
    location: US
    project: ${project}
    bucketEncryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 0
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    publicAccessPrevention: "inherited"
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    customPlacementConfig:
      dataLocations: []
    autocommit: false
    enableLogging: false
    enableVersioning: false
    enableCORS: true
    enableLifecycle: true
    enableEncryption: false
    enableLabels: true
    enableWebsite: true
    enableCors: true
    enableLifecycleRule: true
